purpose: Track external witness records as evidence provenance, not as project endorsement or highest status.

records.source: 中华人民共和国广东省深圳市深圳公证处
records.summary: Notarial certificate (2026)深证字第36024号 records the supervised evidence-preservation process performed on 6 May 2026 for the material object associated with Core Object Alpha, including photographed exterior evidence, microscope photographs, recorded video, and preserved digital files.
records.verification_level_if_any: external_witness=notarial_scope; evidence-preservation and witnessed-procedure scope only
limitations: The notarial certificate is an objective record of the specified evidence-preservation process; it does not certify the Accord's philosophical propositions.
It does not establish advanced forensic identity, confidential flaw-challenge completion, or multi-party forensic attestation.
It does not create canonical authority, amend the Bitcoin Originals, or establish successor reception.

does_not_prove: External witness records do not prove the protocol is true.
External witness records do not create canonical authority.
External witness records do not rank above reception.
